product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm really interested in them. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you! 

Best regards, 
[Your Name]

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! Thank you for your interest in the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones. They truly offer an unparalleled audio experience. While these are highly sought after at their retail price of $399, I'm open to considering a reasonable offer.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering offers. Given my budget of $478.80, would you be willing to offer a discounted price for the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Yes, absolutely! Given your budget, I can certainly offer them to you at $478.80. These headphones are truly top-tier. Would you like to proceed with the purchase at this price?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but unfortunately, $478.80 is at my maximum budget. I'm afraid I won't be able to proceed with the purchase at that price. Thank you for your understanding.
